# hooks

React hooks for client-side state management and real-time data streaming in the Next.js web application. Provides active section tracking for table-of-contents navigation and WebSocket-based query streaming.

## Contents

### State Management Hooks

- **[use-active-section.ts](./use-active-section.ts)** — `useActiveSection()` hook managing TOC active section highlighting with click-lock mechanism; exports `{ activeId, handleInView, forceActive }`; used by `apps/web/components/viewer/toc-sidebar.tsx`
- **[use-query-stream.ts](./use-query-stream.ts)** — `useQueryStream()` hook orchestrating WebSocket streaming of LLM responses; exports `{ answer, status, citations, error, askQuestion }`; consumed by `apps/web/components/query/` components

## Architecture

**Event-Driven State Pattern**: `use-active-section` coordinates intersection observer callbacks (`handleInView`) with user interaction locks (`forceActive`), preventing race conditions during programmatic scrolling. `use-query-stream` manages WebSocket lifecycle (`wsRef`) and token accumulation across render cycles.

## Integration Points

- `use-active-section` → `apps/web/components/viewer/toc-sidebar.tsx` (TOC highlighting)
- `use-query-stream` → `apps/web/lib/query-api.ts` (`createQuery`, `Citation` type)
- `use-query-stream` → `NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL` env var (WebSocket endpoint)
- `use-query-stream` → `apps/web/components/query/streaming-answer.tsx` (renders `answer` state)

## Behavioral Contracts

### Active Section Selection Algorithm
`pickTopmost` function selects section with smallest `Math.abs(getBoundingClientRect().top)`. When `bestTop < -200`, prefers sections with `top > bestTop`. Respects lock when `Date.now() < lockUntil.current`.

### Lock Duration Constants
- `forceActive` lock: **1200ms** (matches smooth scroll animation duration)

### WebSocket Message Protocol
Message types: `status` (updates `QueryStatus`), `token` (appends to `answer`), `citations` (sets `Citation[]`), `done` (terminal success), `error` (terminal failure with `message` field).

### Query Status States
`QueryStatus` type: `"idle" | "retrieving" | "generating" | "done" | "error"`

### WebSocket Cleanup Rules
`wsRef.current.close()` called on new `askQuestion` invocation. `onclose` handler only sets error state if not already in `"done"` or `"error"` status, preventing double-fault reporting.
